## Skill Name
<!-- e.g., email-summarizer -->

## Domain
<!-- e.g., Communication, Monitoring, Integration -->

## Use When
<!-- One clear sentence: "Use when the PA needs to..." -->

## What It Should Do
<!-- Describe the steps or behavior the skill should cover -->

## Why It's Needed
<!-- What problem does this solve? What happened without it? -->

## Related Skills
<!-- Does it overlap or compose with existing skills? -->
